Speakers.Speaker: Spending Time with Your Peers in the Dorm

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 280}At night, you'll have some time to spend with your party members. Doing so might lead to some interesting revelations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Sometimes, {f 0 1 2}these discoveries can be helpful in battle{f 0 1 27}, so don't be shy about approaching your teammates.[n]{f 1 1}
